So in ch 5, why didnt the keeper instantly link with Celeste instead of waiting until they arrive on land?
||Celeste was still linked with Elton, so keeper can't link with her without Elton first severing his link||
So why didnt Elton sever the link? I mean he did sever it at the end of the chapter right, and that was instantenous
Yeah I see your ship BIAV
because its rude. imagine if someone just came up to you and asked for custody of your beloved pet/child/belonging.
even you wouldn't do it immediately
I mean its a life or death situation right, im sure Elton wouldve understand
And he could link back after
The human experience is defined by its irrationalities and emotional bonds
Without it, life will be a bit dour just going by what's the best choice

it also helps that in that situation Elton is much more familiar with handling Celeste compared to keeper, and thus can better ||maintain the domain while keeper runs around focusing on bigger problems||
I think this is it, man what a good answer ye
tbh i think it would be possible for keeper and elton to both link Celeste at the same time, given that helot has multiple simultaneous linkers
but given keepers situation in ch5, probably for the best that they didnt
The human experience, sure, but if a narrative, a fictional story deliberately overcomplicates itself without reason its just unsatisfactory
Celeste was already ||low on spiritual power, so keeper linking with her would further weaken them because she would be siphoning from them||
and they only found out how to stabilize her when she got to Mythag
Agreed, thanks again

I mean i think it would be worth it since Celeste seems to be capable to teleport any entity within her domain haha, but yeah the keeper's mental state probably isnt suited for that, and they linked Caecus despite their mental state to save him from dying
Oh, wait. They couldn’t break Celeste’s link.
The domain would collapse.
*Even if* the Keeper could have maintained it better than Elton given their condition, the domain collapsing even for a moment has extremely dire consequences
||ram did ask Celeste to do it for a split second and that was enough for Murphy to start kneeling over||
Yeah, it wavered for a moment and everything went to shit

||The domain did collapse completely after that, when the explosion happened. ||
||The reason Murphy kneeled over is referred directly because she lived in the domain for so long, when the "god" reconnects it resulted in serious backlash, and when the domain fell for the second time she isnt immediately hurt||
maybe we should spoiler stuff just in case a newbie walks in

Wait
Ok but how actually are they awakened
all i know is that sorel being awakened twice is dangerous and risky and rare
hol on lemme get the doc
you mean to tell me its convuluted enough to warrant a doc???
nah its just 1 small segment of the whole doc
but the short version is theres 3 unofficial types of awakeners, Revived, Transformed and Entity
revived means died as a human and was summoned (mythag style, so the most common type)
transformed means they didnt have to die but was transformed into an awakener via various methods (think castor and pollux)
entity is edge cases which don't fit in the other 2 (so tawil and daffodil for example)
Ahh i see, got to reading both docs, interesting

seems like this is from the whisperer in darkness
(do we know if this map has any lore relevance and/or if it's a separate morimens map or just ripped from somewhere)
The map is just Antarctica, the “great ice barrier” is now called the Ross ice shelf and Victoria land is what that stretch of land in Antarctica is called
It is a way more modern map of Antarctica than they would have had in the rough timeframe the game takes place in

||is Tulu the actual god that miryam was trying to resurrect or just the prophet||
You can see the “one ton depot” market on the map, which refers to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Terra_Nova_Expedition this expedition

embeds.title: Terra Nova Expedition
embeds.description: The Terra Nova Expedition, officially the British Antarctic Expedition, was an expedition to Antarctica which took place between 1910 and 1913. Led by Captain Robert Falcon Scott, the expedition had various scientific and geographical objectives. Scott wished to continue the scientific work that he

it's actually an extremely important distinction
because it is VERY VERY CLEAR in the original chinese text that they do not pray/worship god
they pray/worship their king
the pope if people didn't fw god that much
their king will then speak to god and bring about the divine realm

but the lemurians don't pray to god directly, they're not worthy and god doesn't hear or answer them
again this doesn't really come up in the story (yet) so it doesn't actually impact anything (yet)
but it's a pretty important distinction to make that the english currently does not convey very well
